Package neqsim.process.equipment.compressor

Class CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageScanInput

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.compressor.CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageScanInput
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
CompressorAntiSurgeApplication
public static class CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageScanInput extends Object implements Serializable
Stage scan input.

  • Constructor Details

    • StageScanInput

      public StageScanInput(double margin, double marginRate, double inletFlow, double surgeFlow, double suctionDensity)
      Create stage scan input.
      Parameters:
      margin - measured surge margin
      marginRate - margin rate in margin units per second
      inletFlow - inlet flow in m3/hr
      surgeFlow - surge flow in m3/hr
      suctionDensity - suction density in kg/m3

  • Method Details

    • fromStage

      public static CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageScanInput fromStage(CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageApplication stage)
      Create scan input from design defaults.
      Parameters:
      stage - stage configuration
      Returns:
      stage scan input

    • fromTopology

      public static CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageScanInput fromTopology(CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageApplication stage, CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.TopologyBinding topology)
      Create scan input from a bound real NeqSim topology.
      Parameters:
      stage - stage configuration containing design fallbacks
      topology - topology binding
      Returns:
      scan input from compressor measurements and design fallbacks
